text: Lagta hai tum bahut sharminda aur akela mehsoos kar rahe ho, jaise bol doge toh log tumhari takleef ko serious nahi lenge aur aur door kar denge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bilkul aisa hi lag raha tha. Tumne bola toh thoda halka laga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Disability stigma + family blame context normalise karna aur worth outcome se alag karna.
text: Jahan bache ki disability pe blame chalta ho aur upar se shehar wali baat lag jaye, aisa freeze hona bahut common hai. Tumhari keemat isse kam nahi hoti ki tum kitna chup ho ya kitna roye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thak gaya hoon. Ab bas kuch seedha chahiye, par abhi dimaag blank hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Family head + disability stigma duniya ka common silent pattern dikhana.
text: Ghar ke mukhiya logon mein yeh pattern bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolta nahi kyunki blame ka darr zyada hota hai aur bolne se lagta hai izzat kam ho jayegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Samajh aa raha hai. Koi raasta hai kya? Aaj bas thoda ground hona hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness par teen chhote, <10 min options dena bina naya bojh.
text: Teen chhote steps: (1) 90 second gehri saans; (2) paani pee kar ek line likhna "aaj overload hai"; (3) ek trusted aadmi ko short text "aaj mushkil din hai". Doctor/clinic baad mein, pehle yeh mehfooz.

speaker: Seeker
text: Line likh lunga. Text thoda mushkil hai par try karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Note + paani + saans ko step-by-step dena.
text: Pehle haath-paon dho lo aur ek glass paani piyo. Phir notes mein likho: "Aaj overload hai, main yahin hoon." Phir 6 gehri saans lo. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Likh diya. Thoda panic kam, sharir halka sa feel ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Micro-step ko validate karna aur agency reinforce karna.
text: Bahut accha. Tumne freeze ke beech khud ko ek chhota sa anchor diya hai, yeh hi pehli jeet hoti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kal disability support line pe phone try karunga, aaj bas yeh karna tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Overload ko structural signal ke roop mein ek baar reframe karna.
text: Ghar mein jab blame chal raha ho aur upar ek aur emotional jhatka lage, dimaag pehle survival mode mein chala jata hai; yeh tumhari himmat ki kami nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Samajh aa gaya. Pehle lag raha tha main hi toot gaya hoon, ab thoda map dikh raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Kal ke call ke liye realistic time lock karna.
text: Kal agar ek call karni ho toh subah kaunsa waqt tumhe sabse kam pressure wala lagega?

speaker: Seeker
text: 9:30 baje, office se pehle kar lunga. Tab dimaag zyada clear rehta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Call se pehle do bullet prep dena.
text: Phone uthane se pehle do line paper pe likh lo: "bache ki umar" aur "kis madad ki zaroorat hai". Ya sirf ek line: "please guide next step". Jo natural lage.

speaker: Seeker
text: Do line wala better hai, scatter nahi hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prep choice ko validate karna.
text: Bahut grounded choice hai. Tumne bade storm ko chhote tukdon mein todna shuru kar diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukriya, pehle sirf freeze tha, ab thoda direction bhi dikh raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ghar par blame topic ke liye do low-conflict openers dena.
text: Shaam ko agar baat ho toh do opener rakhna: (1) "Main bache ko nuksan pahunchane wala baap nahi hoon"; (2) "Aaj mujhe blame se zyada ek minute sunwai chahiye". Jo kam jhagda kare woh.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sunwai wali line zyada sach lag rahi hai. Woh bolunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Repair intent ko reinforce karna.
text: Bahut himmat wali line hai. Tumne ilzaam ka jawab nahi, apni zaroorat rakhi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab theek lag raha hai. Dil baithna wala panic kam hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sone se pehle ek wind-down anchor fix karna.
text: Raat ko sone se pehle tum kya 5 minute pakka karoge — chai, walk, ya kuch aur?

speaker: Seeker
text: 5 minute walk pakka karunga, phir soun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closure par note + walk + kal call + ghar line ko anchor karna.
text: Note, walk, kal 9:30 call, aur shaam ki sunwai wali line — yeh chhote kadam milkar tumhe zameen denge. Tumne aaj bahut bada emotional load sambhala hai, tum akela nahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Dimaag itna bhara hai ki bas rona chahta hoon, par office face bhi banana padta hai. Andar se poora khaali-pan sa lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens F se emotional overwhelm mirror karna, stressor push nahi.
text: Abhi tum bilkul thak ke bhar gaye ho, jaise rona bhi kaam ka lag raha ho aur rokna bhi mushkil ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, dimaag itna bhara hai ki seedha soch bhi nahi pa raha. Saans lene mein bhi mehnat lag rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se lambe samay se chal rahi thakan mirror karna.
text: Kuch waqt se tum isi bhaari mode mein chal rahe ho, aur ab lagta hai limit cross ho gayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Unki baat sunkar meri toh aatma kaanp gayi, jaise khali-pan ka mazaak uda diya ho. Uske baad se dimaag itna bhara hai ki kuch clear nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se invalidation aur shame ke implied darr ko softly mirror karna.
text: Woh khali-pan ka mazaak udaane wali feeling tumhe poora jhatka de gayi, jaise tumhari mehnat ko kuchla gaya ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Career aur health dono neglect ho gaye, din bhar doctor-clinic ke chakkar aur ghar ki baatein sunte sunte thak chuka hoon. Dimaag itna bhara hai ki ab kuch sujh hi nahi raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Do restatements ke baad overwhelm ke andar sabse zyada dabaav wala hissa nikalwana.
text: Jab dimaag itna bhara ho, us waqt sabse zyada kis baat ka bojh tumhare seene par padta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sabse zyada yahi ki aage kya hoga, mujhse mat pucho. Lagta hai main gira toh sab gir jayega, aur phir bhi kuch kar nahi pa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se relational zimmedari aur akelapan mirror karna.
text: Tumhare naam ke neeche itna bojh likha hai ki tumhe lagta hai tum giraoge toh sab kuch toot jayega, aur phir bhi tum akela pad gaye ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur bolunga toh lagta hai log pagal samjhenge. Isliye bas chup rehna safe lagta hai, par andar fat raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue ke baad chhoti restatement, sawal ke bina.
text: Bolne ka darr tumhe aur andar chipka deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Dimaag itna bhara hai ki ab sirf rote rehne ka mann hai, koi raasta dikhai nahi deta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Intensity 3 par C7 ke hisaab se help maangne ki sharm aur thakawat ke saath akelapan reflect karna.
